element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn roster mechanics and team composition before gameplay begins
Core mechanics of shooting, passing, and movement established immediately
Signature mechanic allowing players to jump and dunk above normal human capabilities
Players learn defensive tactics without foul consequences
Optional discovery element; players unlock through exploration and progression
Meta-progression system that rewards repeated play and skill development

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced arcade-style action with momentum swings; exaggerated presentation and over-the-top style creates constant entertainment rather than traditional tension/release

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden secret characters discoverable through exploration and progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction with accessible 2-on-2 basketball mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive opponent difficulty as player advances through tournament or arcade mode
difficulty_curve.late_game: Challenging AI opponents with higher skill attributes and tactical play
notable_spikes: Secret characters have unique stat distributions and playstyles

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequential match progression against increasingly difficult opponents; players advance through tournament brackets
notable_level_patterns.example_level: NBA Jam Tournament Edition introduced formal tournament structure with player substitutions

notable_level_patterns.description: Continuous play against procedurally varied opponent teams; emphasis on high scores and stat tracking
Hidden roster expansion accessed through unlocks or cheat codes; provides gameplay variation and replay incentive
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Varied secret characters including mascots and celebrities across all versions
